# ANCBuddy

> ANCBuddy is an independent macOS menu-bar app for Bose QC Ultra headphones and earbuds. It lets Mac users switch Quiet, Aware, and Immersion modes, check battery status, use Launch at Login, and optionally generate track-aware AI Auto-EQ profiles. The app supports macOS 12+ on Apple Silicon and Intel Macs and costs $9.99 one-time after a 14-day free trial.

## Links

- [Website](https://ancbuddy.com/)
- [Changelog](https://ancbuddy.com/changelog.html)
- [Checkout](https://ancbuddy.lemonsqueezy.com/checkout/buy/b79f3888-28fa-4438-8328-fb604518cbc2)
- [Download DMG](https://github.com/denizaytac/ancbuddy-site/releases/download/v2.0.2/ANCBuddy-2.0.2.dmg)

## Facts

- Product: native Mac menu-bar utility for compatible Bose QC Ultra hardware.
- Compatibility: Bose QC Ultra Headphones Gen 1, Bose QC Ultra Headphones Gen 2, and Bose QC Ultra Earbuds 2nd Gen.
- Platform: macOS 12 Monterey and newer on Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.
- Price: $9.99 USD one-time license.
- Trial: 14-day free trial.
- Current version: 2.0.2.
- AI Auto-EQ: optional feature that uses the current artist, title, and album to generate a 3-band EQ profile. Results are cached by a hashed track key, and raw song names are not stored.
- Independence: ANCBuddy is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Bose Corporation. Bose, QuietComfort, and QC Ultra are trademarks of Bose Corporation.
